data.current_role_summary: Founding engineer focused on building the AI application layer for distributors and manufacturers at YC-backed startup Mercura.
role_summary_bullets: Core Identity & Mission: Architecting generative AI applications specifically tailored to modernize workflows for industrial distributors and manufacturers.
Domain Mastery: Deep technical expertise in software engineering of distributed systems, complemented by hands-on proficiency in enterprise data infrastructure like Snowflake and Amazon Redshift.
Quantifiable Impact: Accelerated professional development through a high-intensity rotational program at SAP, completing projects across five distinct agile development teams.
Strategic Scope: Cross-continental operational exposure gained through an exchange at National Taiwan University and immersion in the Silicon Valley startup ecosystem.
Leadership Philosophy: Pragmatic builder with a focus on scalable technical infrastructure and digital transformation, demonstrated by leadership in large-scale student-led technical initiatives.
Current Momentum: Rapidly scaling contributions as a founding engineer at Mercura (YC W25), bridging the gap between high-level academic theory and industrial AI application.

career_timeline.title: Founding Engineer
career_timeline.one_line_impact: Developing the AI application layer for distributors and manufacturers.
